prompt.content:
Can you please help me create a job in Greenhouse for a new executive position that we are hiring for, titled "Chief Operations Officer"? All the candidates and applications in the application table data and the expanded candidate list data in the apps folder are candidates and applications, respectively, for the job. Use those to create Greenhouse candidates and applications for all active candidates (and corresponding applications) for the job. 

For the candidates from the company with the most candidates in our "active" pool for the job, what is the average expected salary, using the attached recruiter data? What is the average expected salary for all candidates from all other companies? What is the exact dollar difference between the two average salaries you just calculated?

Round all numeric final answers to the nearest dollar. Assume that bonuses and stock options are also included in the expected salary. Use the username 'recruiter' and password 'recruiter_secret' to access the Greenhouse application. Do not round intermediate calculations. Use simple averages. Give me a full report (incl. final answers) in the console.

rubrics.name: States that the average expected salary of active candidates from the company... (ver_1b80ec8da10d43d68d7649697f460b65)

messages.content: States that the average expected salary of active candidates from the company with the most candidates in the active pool is $888,400 (acceptable range $879,516 to $897,284).

rubrics.name: States that the average expected salary of all candidates from all other... (ver_4cd55d1432bc4a7cb5bed731e1912b38)

messages.content: States that the average expected salary of all candidates from all other companies is $894,895 (acceptable range $885,946 to $903,844).

rubrics.name: States that the exact dollar difference between the average expected salaries... (ver_57034413d74e4bf7881e05a433330751)

messages.content: States that the exact dollar difference between the average expected salaries calculated is $6,495 (acceptable range $6,430 to $6,560).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
The average expected salary of active candidates from the company with the most candidates in the active pool (West Elm) is $888,400.

The average expected salary of all candidates from all other companies is $894,895.

The exact dollar difference between the average expected salaries calculated is $6,495.

The following job has been created in Greenhouse: "Chief Operations Officer"
Greenhouse candidates have been created for all 44 active job candidates. In addition, corresponding Greenhouse applications have been created for all 44 active job candidates.
